title: Preciva 90 Degree Right Angle Positioning Square Clamp, Aluminum Alloy Right Angle Clamp,Professional Woodworking Tools Woodworking Block for Picture Frames Cabinet Drawers - 2 Sets （14cm/5.5"
features: 【High-Tech Material】Aluminum Alloy squares clamps. Machined from a solid block of aluminum, durable material, will lasts for years. Surface Treatment-Anodized Black surface.

【Easy to Handle】Professional Woodworking Tools, Just place the square in the corner of the two stock pieces you need to square and secure with a set of clamps.This set of square and clamps can make your operation more convenient.

【Wide Application】Maintain a perfect square angle, This 90 degree positioning squares right angle clamps fixing clamp are widely used for assemble and DIY by clamping boxes, drawers, cabinets, frames, furniture cabinets, etc.

【Size and Packaging】The actual Woodworking work shows that this size(140mm/5.5 inch Squares)set is a very scientific and suitable length size choice. It fit for the wood board thickness up to 50mm(2inch). Package coming with 2pcs * 140mm(5.5") 90 degree positioning squares and 4pcs each for base,right angle screw, fixing nuts.

【Professional Woodworking Tools】90 Degree Right Angle Positioning Square Clamp They are essential for checking and positioning wood panel joints, ensuring precise glue-ups or welds at right angles. Enhance the accuracy and efficiency of your woodworking projects.
description: Product Description 5.5"×5.5" 90 Degree Positioning Squares 2 Sets Aluminum alloy square clip，it can last for many years. Anodized black finish, dirt-resistant, durable, corrosion-resistant, rust-resistant. Equipped with 4 nuts, free your hands and make your work more convenient. precise angle The positioning block is made of high-quality aluminum alloy to ensure 90-degree accuracy suitable size Our 90 degree positioning block is equipped with adjustable screw and nut, it can be adjusted up to 50mm, which will meet most of your needs free your hands Professional design, the 90 degree positioning block is equipped with a fixing nut, which is more accurate at a 90 degree right angle Display Nuts Made of high-quality ABS for superior durability and toughness, ensuring a solid connection to the item Double Accurate Scales Embossed scales in “inches” and “millimeters” on side & surface of positioning squares,let it work as a ruler. The woodworking clamps set is great for building pieces such as wooden boxes, kitchen cabinet, drawers, picture frames, birdhouse, mailbox, etc. Package Include 2 * Right Angle Positioning Block 4 * Adjustable Fixing Block 4 * Right Angle Rod 4 * M8 Nut User Mannul
